title: BetterLight
description: A small mod that improves lighting in Beta, client side
body:
This is a small mod that improves lighting in Beta. Mod is completely client side.
Requires [Fabric Legacy](https://github.com/calmilamsy/Cursed-Fabric-MultiMC) and [Station API (1.3.1)](https://github.com/ModificationStation/StationAPI)
</br>
</br>
![screenshot](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/17707380/133726834-a19f36d5-1b03-427d-9b20-8eae4a9e32ce.png)
</br>
</br>
**Content list:**
- Color lights (for any light sources including modded);
- API for light sources registration;
- Custom AO calculation.

**Compatibility:**
- Compatible with GLSL (tested);
- Should be compatible with other rendering-related mods.

**Realisation Details:**
- Colored lights uses simple linear interpolations and vertex coloring;
- AO uses some smart calculations to prevent too dark areas and light leaks;

[How to install (MultiMC)](https://github.com/paulevsGitch/BetterLight-b.1.7.3-/tree/0.1.0#how-to-install-multimc)

[API for mods](https://github.com/paulevsGitch/BetterLight-b.1.7.3-/tree/0.1.0#lights-api)
